heading: Configure Workforce Identity Federation Authentication
body:
> **Note:** 
>
> Prerequisite
>
> This procedure requires you to have [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>)
> access and assumes you already have an OIDC (OpenID Connect) application
> created in your IdP (Identity Provider). To learn
> how to configure an IdP (Identity Provider), see [Configure An External Identity Provider Application](configure-idp-oidc).

To configure a Workforce Identity Provider in Atlas:
